zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Egidia de Burgh of Ulster於1263年出生在愛爾蘭康瑙特時，她的父親Walter de Burgh 1st Earl of Ulster33歲，母親Aveline FitzJohn29歲。她和James Stewart 5th High Steward of Scotland至少有4個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1327年10月26日在蘇格蘭班福爾卡倫享年64歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭費伏。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Egidia de Burgh of Ulster于1263年出生在爱尔兰康瑙特时，她的父亲Walter de Burgh 1st Earl of Ulster33岁，母亲Aveline FitzJohn29岁。她和James Stewart 5th High Steward of Scotland至少有4个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1327年10月26日在苏格兰班福爾卡倫享年64岁，埋葬在苏格兰費伏。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Burgh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from one or other of the ten English places named Burgh in northern England and East Anglia, or the six named Brough in Derbyshire, Nottinghamshire, Westmorland, and Yorkshire. All these are from Old English burg, burh, Middle English burgh ‘massive earthwork, fortification; manor, borough’. Compare Bury . The placename Burgh is pronounced as borough. The surname Brough arose equally from places now called Burgh and Brough, and is the more common form of the surname in modern Britain, where it is pronounced bruff or broof (/brʊf/). The Scottish surname was probably brought in from Yorkshire. For the surname in Ireland see Burke .

variants.name: Burke
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Kieran, Siobhan, Aileen, Brennan, Brigid, Donovan, Liam, Murphy, Ulick, Aidan, Dermot.

English and Irish (of Anglo-Norman origin): habitational name from Burgh (Castle) in Suffolk, England. Burk represents an Anglo-Norman pronunciation of Old English burg, Middle English burgh ‘fortification’ (see Burgh ).

variants.name: Bury
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from Bury in Lancashire (now part of Greater Manchester), or from some other similarly named place. The placename comes from the dative case, byrig, of Old English burh ‘fortified place’.

Walloon and French: habitational name from any of several places so named, in Wallonia (Belgium) and Oise (France). The placename is from Buriacum, the name of a Gallo-Roman estate, composed of the personal name Burius + the locative suffix -acum. This surname is also found in the Flemish part of Belgium.

variants.name: Brough
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from any of various English places called Brough or Burgh. See   Burgh  .
Scottish: habitational name from Brough in Harray (Orkney).
Americanized form of German   Brauch   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

variants.name: Burrow
meanings: topographic name for someone who lived by a castle or manor house, or in a town, especially a chartered town or borough (Middle English burgh, Old English burg ‘fortified place, borough, manor’), or a habitational name for someone who came from a place so named because it was a fortified town or near an ancient fort, such as Burrow (Leicestershire, Lancashire), Burrough Green (Cambridgeshire), Brough (numerous counties), and Peterborough (Northamptonshire); see also Burgh .

topographic name for someone who lived on a hill or near a mound (Middle English bergh, Old English beorg), or a habitational name for someone who came from a place so named, such as Burrow (Devon, Somerset). Middle English bergh became throughly confused with burgh in 1 above. Compare Burrough .

nameMeanings.name: Egidia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Egidia de Burgh of Ulster was born in 1263, in Connaught, Ireland, her father, Walter de Burgh 1st Earl of Ulster, was 33 and her mother, Aveline FitzJohn, was 29. She had at least 4 sons and 1 daughter with James Stewart 5th High Steward of Scotland. She died on 26 October 1327, in Cullen, Banffshire, Scotland, at the age of 64, and was buried in Fife, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Egidia de Burgh of Ulster est née en 1263, à Connaught, Irlande, son père, Walter de Burgh 1st Earl of Ulster, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Aveline FitzJohn, avait 29 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille avec James Stewart 5th High Steward of Scotland. Elle est décédée le 26 octobre 1327, à Cullen, Banffshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterrée à Fife, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Egidia de Burgh of Ulster 1263 in Connaught, Irland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Walter de Burgh 1st Earl of Ulster 33 und ihre Mutter Aveline FitzJohn 29. Sie hatte mit James Stewart 5th High Steward of Scotland mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 26. Oktober 1327 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Cullen, Banffshire, Scotland und wurde in Fife, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Egidia de Burgh of Ulster è nata il nel 1263 nel Connaught, Irlanda, sua padre, Walter de Burgh 1st Earl of Ulster, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Aveline FitzJohn, aveva 29 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia con James Stewart 5th High Steward of Scotland. Morì il 26 ottobre 1327, nel Cullen, Banffshire, Scotland, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolta a Fife, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Egidia de Burgh of Ulsterが1263年にアイルランドコナウトで生まれた時，父Walter de Burgh 1st Earl of Ulsterは33歳，母Aveline FitzJohnは29歳であった。彼女はJames Stewart 5th High Steward of Scotlandとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1327年10月26日にスコットランドバンフシュアイアクウレンで64歳で死去し，スコットランドフィフにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Egidia de Burgh of Ulster(이)가 1263년 아일랜드 콘오트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Walter de Burgh 1st Earl of Ulster(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Aveline FitzJohn(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 James Stewart 5th High Steward of Scotland(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1327년 10월 26일 스컷랜드 반프실르 컬렌에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 피프에 묻혔다.

mn.of, Paisley, Renfrew, Scotland: Paisley, Siorrachd Rinn Friù, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Egidia de Burgh of Ulster nasceu em 1263, em Connaught, Irlanda, seu pai, Walter de Burgh 1st Earl of Ulster, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Aveline FitzJohn, tinha 29 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha com James Stewart 5th High Steward of Scotland. Ela faleceu em 26 de outubro de 1327, em Cullen, Banffshire, Scotland, com 64 anos, e foi sepultada em Fife, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Egidia de Burgh of Ulster родилась в 1263 г. в местности коннот, Ирландия, её отцу по имени Walter de Burgh 1st Earl of Ulster было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Aveline FitzJohn, 29. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь от James Stewart 5th High Steward of Scotland. Она умерла 26 октября 1327 г. в местности куллен, банффшир, Шотландия в возрасте 64 лет и была похоронена в местности фиф, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Egidia de Burgh of Ulster nació en 1263, en Connaught, Irlanda, su papá, Walter de Burgh 1st Earl of Ulster, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Aveline FitzJohn, tenía 29 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija con James Stewart 5th High Steward of Scotland. Murió el 26 de octubre de 1327, en Cullen, Banffshire, Scotland, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultada en Fife, Scotland.
